changelog:
PHTVC 1.1 Stable Highlights:
• Generic 2-3 letter channel badges for legal safety
• Broadcaster Non-Affiliation legal disclaimer & takedown link
• 1-Tap Account Deletion request under Settings
• Asynchronous player disconnect on network loss
• In-App OTA Update alerts (Mandatory & Optional)
updateMessage: PHTVC 1.1 Stable is now available with legal safety enhancements, generic channel badges, account deletion options, and stability fixes.
